title: "Worried about getting sued": HasanAbi accuses Fox News of running a “stalker operation” during heated livestream
summary_full: Twitch streamer HasanAbi criticized Fox News after the network referenced the 2025 "CollarGate" controversy involving his dog, Kaya, during a segment about his federal subpoena related to a trip to Cuba. Reacting on stream, Hasan accused the network of employing “literal stalkers” and called its coverage a “stalker operation.” He argued that evidence had already disproven key allegations and expressed frustration over the controversy being revived months later.
